purpose: A rule head naming a head function nobody registered is SILENT at the pin: _call_head_function's objmode loop finds no __name__ match and returns the pre-seeded empty grounding list (interpretation.py:2330-2338), so the head grounds to nothing, the rule fires for no one, and reason() completes — the trace carries zero rule rows. The contrast with the annotation side's NameError is the pinned asymmetry.
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_head_function (unregistered-name arm, screened); interpretation.py:2316-2338 at the pin; screened live 2026-07-07 (screen_fnedge.py head-unregistered)
